mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `order` ( order_num, user_id, total_amount, status, receiver_name, receiver_phone, receiver_address, remark, create_time, original_amount, discount ) VALUES ( #{orderNum}, #{userId}, #{totalAmount}, #{status}, #{receiverName}, #{receiverPhone}, #{receiverAddress}, #{remark}, #{createTime}, #{originalAmount}, #{discount} )
INSERT INTO order_item ( order_id, product_id, product_name, product_price, quantity ) VALUES ( #{orderId}, #{productId}, #{productName}, #{productPrice}, #{quantity} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM `order` ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM `order` WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE `order` SET status = #{status}, deliver_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE `order` SET status = #{status}, pay_time = NOW(), finish_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE user SET money = money + #{money} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE product SET stock = stock - #{quantity} WHERE id = #{productId} AND stock >= #{quantity}
mapper.select:
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(total_amount), 0) FROM `order` WHERE status = 3 AND finish_time IS NOT NULL
AND finish_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY)

SELECT oi.product_id AS productId, oi.product_name AS productName, SUM(oi.quantity) AS totalQuantity FROM order_item oi INNER JOIN `order` o ON oi.order_id = o.id WHERE o.status = 3 AND o.finish_time >= DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-01') AND o.finish_time < DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH), '%Y-%m-01') GROUP BY oi.product_id, oi.product_name ORDER BY totalQuantity DESC LIMIT #{limit}
